title: pfaffia glomerata
intro: Pfaffia glomerata, also known as suma, is a type of plant that belongs to the Amarantaceae family and is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Suma root is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the root of the Pfaffia glomerata plant is often used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional dishes in some parts of South America.
